elements.text:
A friend tells a funny joke and you start to laugh really hard. While you're laughing, you feel an uncomfortable tightness in your chest that you've never felt before. 

Here are some feelings that might happen in the moment:

texts: I'm worried about the tightness in my chest, but I think it will go away soon.
I'm anxious about this feeling in my chest, but I know it's just from laughing really hard.
I'm so surprised by that joke!
I'm happy that my friends are so funny.
I'm terrified by the tightness in my chest.
